overall.description: A first-person cockpit view from a futuristic aircraft flying through a cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle navigates between neon-lit skyscrapers with large holographic advertisements, banking around towers to reveal the sprawling cityscape below. The scene features heavy atmospheric haze and is dominated by pink, blue, and green neon lighting against the dark sky.

events.description: initiating left bank turn to navigate around the central tower cluster

agents.ego_description: piloting the aircraft forward through the city canyon toward the neon-lit tower cluster, maintaining steady altitude

entered.detail: tall cluster of skyscrapers covered in bright neon advertisements and lighting
large holographic display showing a blue humanoid figure on the side of the central tower
dense grouping of illuminated high-rise buildings on the left side of the flight path
dark body of water visible on the right horizon beyond the city lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a steady forward flight through a neon-lit cyberpunk city canyon. The aircraft approaches a central cluster of skyscrapers adorned with bright holographic advertisements, including a prominent blue figure. The left side shows a dense cluster of illuminated towers, while dark water stretches to the right. At the end of the segment, the pilot begins a left bank turn to navigate around the central obstacle.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial overview of city grid during steep turn

events.description: entering steep left bank to circle around the tower cluster
passing through thicker atmospheric haze layer darkening the ambient light

agents.ego_description: banking the aircraft sharply left to navigate around the central towers, revealing the sprawling illuminated city grid below

entered.detail: expansive view of the city street grid illuminated by thousands of lights below the aircraft
tall skyscraper with large pink holographic signage visible in the distance ahead
illuminated red rectangular advertisement floating near the flight path
tall glass building with illuminated windows on the right side of the turn

segments.scene_description: The aircraft enters a steep left bank, circling around the central tower cluster and revealing an expansive aerial view of the illuminated city grid below. The urban_smz_tower becomes visible in the distance as the new target destination. The flight passes through thicker atmospheric haze, slightly reducing visibility. The original neon tower cluster falls behind as the aircraft completes the turn maneuver.

scene_state.functional_zone: final approach corridor to central holographic tower

events.description: leveling out from bank to establish direct approach vector
entering close approach to URBAN SMZ tower with holographic display filling view

agents.ego_description: leveling the aircraft and accelerating toward the URBAN SMZ tower, aligning with the large pink holographic display ahead

entered.detail: detailed view of street-level neon lights and traffic below becoming visible
massive pink holographic advertisement displaying URBAN SMZ text and humanoid figure dominating the central view
building with bright green neon signage on the right side of the approach

segments.scene_description: The aircraft levels out from the bank and establishes a direct approach vector toward the URBAN SMZ tower. The massive pink holographic advertisement dominates the view, growing larger as the aircraft closes distance. Street-level details of the neon-lit city become visible below. The segment ends with the aircraft approaching very close to the tower, with the holographic display filling the central field of view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight through a neon-lit cyberpunk canyon that transitions from a narrow urban corridor into a sweeping aerial vista before closing in on a massive skyscraper. It begins with a steady forward glide past illuminated towers and a prominent blue holographic figure, with dark water stretching to the right. As the aircraft initiates a steep left bank to navigate around the central cluster, the perspective shifts to reveal an expansive grid of the city below through a layer of thickening atmospheric haze. The scene then levels out as the aircraft establishes a direct vector toward the distant URBAN SMZ tower, with street-level neon details becoming clearer beneath. Finally, the flight closes the distance until a towering pink holographic advertisement expands to dominate the entire field of view.
